ast.name: error
ast.source: Promise errored, but reply.sent = true was set
ast.target: Promise 出错，但 reply.sent = true 已被设置

ast.name: error
ast.source: The serializer for the given status code failed
ast.target: 给定状态码的序列化器失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: 编译 schema 出错，函数代码：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 编译序列化器出错，函数代码：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 编译解析器出错，函数代码：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error on Stream found for HEAD route
ast.target: 在 HEAD 路由中发现 Stream 错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: set-cookie-parser: failed to decode cookie value. Set options.decodeValues=false to disable decoding.
ast.target: set-cookie-parser: 解码 cookie 值失败。请设置 options.decodeValues=false 以禁用解码。

ast.name: info
ast.source: request aborted - refusing to accept new requests as server is closing
ast.target: 请求已中止 - 服务器正在关闭，拒绝接受新请求

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a vault path to test against ACL rules.
ast.target: 输入一个保险库路径以测试 ACL 规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Port number for the MCP server (requires restart).
ast.target: MCP 服务器的端口号（需要重启）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically start the MCP server on startup.
ast.target: 启动时自动启动 MCP 服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Glob patterns for paths that cannot be read or written; one pattern per line.
ast.target: 不可读写的路径的 Glob 模式；每行一个模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Glob patterns for paths that can be read but not written; one pattern per line.
ast.target: 可读但不可写的路径的 Glob 模式；每行一个模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Glob patterns for paths that can be written; leave empty to allow all except forbidden and read-only paths; one pattern per line.
ast.target: 可写的路径的 Glob 模式；留空以允许除禁止和只读路径外的所有路径；每行一个模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open a dialog to test your ACL patterns against sample vault paths.
ast.target: 打开一个对话框，以测试您的 ACL 模式与示例保险库路径的匹配情况。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Network interface to bind the server to; localhost (127.0.0.1) is recommended for security; use 0.0.0.0 with a bearer token only if you need network access.
ast.target: 绑定服务器的网络接口；出于安全考虑，推荐使用 localhost (127.0.0.1)；仅当需要网络访问时，才配合 Bearer 令牌使用 0.0.0.0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional authentication token; required when using network access; leave empty to disable authentication.
ast.target: 可选的认证令牌；使用网络访问时必需；留空以禁用认证。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 重置为当前已保存的设置

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 生成一个安全的随机令牌

ast.name: warn
ast.target: reply.then 上存在未处理的 rejection

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response terminated with an error with headers already sent
ast.target: 响应已发送头部后因错误而终止

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response will send, but you shouldn't use res.writeHead in stream mode
ast.target: 响应将发送，但您不应在流模式下使用 res.writeHead

ast.name: warn
ast.source: stream payload does not end properly

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Trying to send a NotFound error inside a 404 handler. Sending basic 404 response.
ast.target: 尝试在 404 处理程序中发送 NotFound 错误。正在发送基本的 404 响应。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为 map 已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: the default handler for 404 did not catch this, this is likely a fastify bug, please report it
ast.target: 404 的默认处理程序未捕获此错误，这可能是 fastify 的一个 bug，请报告它

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: set-cookie-parser appears to have been called on a request object. It is designed to parse Set-Cookie headers from responses, not Cookie headers from requests. Set the option {silent: true} to suppress this warning.
ast.target: 警告：set-cookie-parser 似乎是在请求对象上调用的。它旨在解析响应中的 Set-Cookie 头，而不是请求中的 Cookie 头。请设置选项 {silent: true} 以抑制此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 请求缺少 Bearer 令牌

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 请求包含无效的 Bearer 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ⚠️ Network access without authentication is unsafe. Generate a bearer token first.
ast.target: ⚠️ 无认证的网络访问不安全。请先生成一个 Bearer 令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: $data 引用（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）的元 schema

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read note content by path. Returns raw markdown by default; optionally filtered to named sections.
ast.target: 按路径读取笔记内容。默认返回原始 markdown；可选择性地过滤到指定章节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return only these sections by heading text (case-insensitive, includes subheadings).
ast.target: 仅返回这些标题文本对应的章节（不区分大小写，包含子标题）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expand ![[embed]] blocks inline (up to 2 levels deep, no circular refs); expensive — use only when embeds are needed. Default: false.
ast.target: 内联展开 ![[embed]] 块（最多 2 层深度，无循环引用）；开销较大 — 仅在需要嵌入时使用。默认：false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ignored unless includeEmbeds is true. Also expand regular [[links]] inline. Default: false.
ast.target: 除非 includeEmbeds 为 true，否则忽略。同时内联展开常规 [[links]]。默认：false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ignored unless includeEmbeds is true. Regex patterns to skip certain embeds; matched against '[display](link)'.
ast.target: 除非 includeEmbeds 为 true，否则忽略。用于跳过某些嵌入的正则表达式模式；与 '[display](link)' 匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read multiple notes in one request. Returns a map of path to content or error.
ast.target: 在一个请求中读取多个笔记。返回路径到内容或错误的映射。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of note paths to read
ast.target: 要读取的笔记路径数组

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find notes across the vault by folder, tag, frontmatter, modification time, or text content. All parameters are optional and combine with AND logic, except tags[] which is OR within the tag dimension. Returns note paths only — not folder structure; use list_notes to browse directories.
ast.target: 通过文件夹、标签、前置信息、修改时间或文本内容在保险库中查找笔记。所有参数均为可选，并使用 AND 逻辑组合，但 tags[] 在标签维度内使用 OR 逻辑。仅返回笔记路径——不返回文件夹结构；请使用 list_notes 浏览目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restrict to notes under this folder path (recursive).
ast.target: 限制在此文件夹路径下的笔记（递归）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Single tag filter, combined with AND logic alongside other params (e.g., 'project/work'). Use tags[] for OR matching across multiple tags.
ast.target: 单个标签过滤器，与其他参数使用 AND 逻辑组合（例如 'project/work'）。使用 tags[] 进行跨多个标签的 OR 匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return notes that have ANY of these tags (OR logic). Tags without #. Cannot be combined with tag.
ast.target: 返回具有这些标签中任意一个的笔记（OR 逻辑）。标签不带 #。不能与 tag 参数组合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Words must all appear (any order); quote phrases for exact match: `meeting "action items"`.
ast.target: 所有单词必须出现（任意顺序）；引用短语以进行精确匹配：`meeting \"action items\"`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter by modification time. Each value is an ISO date ('2026-04-25') or relative days ('7d' = 7 days ago).
ast.target: 按修改时间过滤。每个值为 ISO 日期（'2026-04-25'）或相对天数（'7d' = 7 天前）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On or before this date (inclusive). ISO date or relative (e.g., '7d').
ast.target: 在此日期或之前（包含）。ISO 日期或相对值（例如 '7d'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On or after this date (inclusive). ISO date or relative (e.g., '7d').
ast.target: 在此日期或之后（包含）。ISO 日期或相对值（例如 '7d'）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 按前置信息键/值过滤（不区分大小写）。例如 {\"status\": \"active\"}。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort order: 'alpha' (default, alphabetical) or 'recent' (newest modified first). Use 'recent' with limit to get recently changed notes.
ast.target: 排序顺序：'alpha'（默认，按字母顺序）或 'recent'（最新修改优先）。将 'recent' 与 limit 配合使用以获取最近更改的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Max notes to return. Only applied when sort is 'recent' (default: 20, max: 50).
ast.target: 返回的最大笔记数。仅在排序为 'recent' 时应用（默认：20，最大：50）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get outgoing links from a note. Returns links and embeds; does not return backlinks.
ast.target: 获取笔记的传出链接。返回链接和嵌入内容；不返回反向链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List notes and subfolders in a directory (non-recursive). Use for vault navigation when folder structure matters. Use search_notes with a folder parameter to find notes recursively without folder structure.
ast.target: 列出目录中的笔记和子文件夹（非递归）。当文件夹结构重要时用于保险库导航。使用带有文件夹参数的 search_notes 递归查找笔记而不保留文件夹结构。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directory path; empty string for vault root.
ast.target: 目录路径；空字符串表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a note or binary file; creates parent folders as needed. Fails if the file already exists. Without a template, content is required. With a template, Templater must be installed; content is optional and appended after the rendered template.
ast.target: 创建笔记或二进制文件；根据需要创建父文件夹。如果文件已存在则失败。没有模板时，内容是必需的。有模板时，必须安装 Templater；内容是可选的，并附加在渲染的模板之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the new file; .md added automatically for text notes.
ast.target: 新文件的路径；文本笔记会自动添加 .md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown content, or base64 for binary. Appended after template if both are given.
ast.target: Markdown 内容，或二进制文件的 base64 编码。如果同时提供模板，则附加在模板之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template path (requires Templater). Use list_templates to see available options.
ast.target: 模板路径（需要 Templater）。使用 list_templates 查看可用选项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: True for binary files; content must be base64. Default: false.
ast.target: 对于二进制文件为 true；内容必须是 base64 编码。默认：false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append content to an existing note, at end of file or after a heading. Use update_note instead when replacing an existing section.
ast.target: 将内容追加到现有笔记的文件末尾或标题之后。替换现有部分时请改用 update_note。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append after this heading (e.g., '## Tasks'); defaults to end of file.
ast.target: 在此标题后追加（例如 '## Tasks'）；默认为文件末尾。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 新内容前的分隔符（默认：'\\n'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace the entire content of an existing note. Use append_to_note for additive changes to avoid data loss.
ast.target: 替换现有笔记的全部内容。为避免数据丢失，请使用 append_to_note 进行追加更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move a note to the system trash (recoverable). If the goal is to rename or move, use rename_note instead to preserve vault links.
ast.target: 将笔记移至系统回收站（可恢复）。如果目标是重命名或移动，请改用 rename_note 以保留保险库链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a note; prefer this over delete+create because it automatically rewrites all [[wikilinks]] and markdown links in the vault that pointed to the old path. delete+create leaves those links broken.
ast.target: 重命名或移动笔记；优先使用此方法而不是删除+创建，因为它会自动重写保险库中所有指向旧路径的 [[wikilinks]] 和 markdown 链接。删除+创建会使这些链接失效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New path; use a different folder to move.
ast.target: 新路径；使用不同的文件夹进行移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a periodic note (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly). Always returns the resolved path; content is included when the note exists. If content is absent and create is true, the note is created using the configured template and returned with content.
ast.target: 读取周期性笔记（每日/每周/每月/每季度/每年）。始终返回解析后的路径；当笔记存在时包含内容。如果内容不存在且 create 为 true，则使用配置的模板创建笔记并返回内容。

ast.name: description
ast.target: ISO 日期（例如 '2025-01-18'）；默认为今天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the note if it does not exist; defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果笔记不存在则创建；默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List available Templater templates; call before create_note to discover valid template paths. Returns templater_enabled: false when Templater is not installed; templates and templates_folder are only present when it is enabled.
ast.target: 列出可用的 Templater 模板；在 create_note 之前调用以发现有效的模板路径。当未安装 Templater 时返回 templater_enabled: false；仅当启用时才存在 templates 和 templates_folder。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The %s schema for %s: %s is missing. This may indicate the schema is not well specified.
ast.target: %s 的 %s 模式：%s 缺失。这可能表明模式定义不完善。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The %s mixes async and callback styles that may lead to unhandled rejections. Please use only one of them.
ast.target: %s 混合了异步和回调风格，这可能导致未处理的拒绝。请仅使用其中一种。

ast.name: message
ast.source: It seems that you are overriding an errorHandler in the same scope, which can lead to subtle bugs.
ast.target: 似乎您正在同一作用域中覆盖一个 errorHandler，这可能导致细微的错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using /%s/ Content-Type which may be vulnerable to CORS attack. Please make sure your RegExp start with "^" or include ";?" to proper detection of the essence MIME type.
ast.target: 您正在使用 /%s/ Content-Type，这可能容易受到 CORS 攻击。请确保您的 RegExp 以 \"^\" 开头或包含 \";?\" 以正确检测本质 MIME 类型。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The router options for %s property access is deprecated. Please use "options.routerOptions" instead for accessing router options. The router options will be removed in `fastify@6`.
ast.target: 用于 %s 属性访问的路由器选项已弃用。请改用 \"options.routerOptions\" 来访问路由器选项。路由器选项将在 `fastify@6` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的某个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须精确匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in union
ast.target: 必须匹配 union 中的某个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must NOT have fewer than 1 items
